docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORP. SYS.* FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUAR, EMAD Y. AS TO DEFENDANT LUFTHANSA AIRLINES
